Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User exists in the system and has valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Invalid Email
Preconditions: User exists in the system but enters an invalid email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the invalid email and valid password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not logged in.

Title: Invalid Password
Preconditions: User exists in the system but enters an invalid password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid email and invalid password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not logged in.

Title: Successful Registration
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system.
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the valid email, password, and personal information.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered, and an account creation confirmation is sent to the provided email.

Title: Invalid Email
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system but enters an invalid email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the invalid email, valid password, and personal information.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered.

Title: Existing Email
Preconditions: User with the same email already exists in the system.
Test Data: Existing email, valid password, and personal information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the existing email, valid password, and personal information.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered.

Title: Successful Exchange Proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items to exchange.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exchange page.
2. Select the items to exchange.
3. Click the "Propose Exchange" button.
Expected Result: The exchange proposal is successfully created and displayed to the user.

Title: Invalid Exchange Proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in but selects invalid items for exchange.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exchange page.
2. Select the invalid items for exchange.
3. Click the "Propose Exchange" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the exchange proposal is not created.

Title: Accepted Exchange
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an exchange proposal.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exchange page.
2. Accept the exchange proposal.
Expected Result: The exchange is successfully completed, and the items are exchanged between the users.

Title: Rejected Exchange
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an exchange proposal.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exchange page.
2. Reject the exchange proposal.
Expected Result: The exchange proposal is rejected, and the items remain with the original owner.

Title: Successful Filter Application
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the items list.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the items list page.
2. Apply the valid filter criteria.
Expected Result: The items list is filtered according to the specified criteria, and only the relevant items are displayed.

Title: Invalid Filter Application
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the items list.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the items list page.
2. Apply the invalid filter criteria.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the items list remains unfiltered.

Title: Successful Profile Update
Preconditions: User is logged in and wants to update their profile.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Update the personal information.
3. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The personal information is successfully updated, and the profile is displayed with the new information.

Title: Invalid Profile Update
Preconditions: User is logged in and wants to update their profile with invalid information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Update the invalid personal information.
3. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the personal information remains unchanged.
